description: Performs a routine wellbeing check-in to monitor stability, detect early signals, and route support as needed.

START.description: Workflow entry. Triggered by schedule, user request, or system signal.

COLLECT_CHECKIN_DATA.description: Collects user-reported wellbeing indicators across core domains (housing, food, health, safety, dignity, economic stability, community).

EVALUATE_STABILITY.description: Evaluates stability using deterministic scoring rules and compares against baseline and recent trends.

GENERATE_SIGNAL.description: Generates a wellbeing signal (green, yellow, orange, red) based on stability evaluation.

ROUTE_SUPPORT.description: Routes the user to appropriate support pathways based on signal severity.

COMPLETE.description: Check-in complete. Data stored, signal logged, and support routed if needed.

REJECT.description: Check-in failed due to missing or invalid data. Requires administrative review.
